subtypes.name: Rate_Number
subtypes.code: subtype Rate_Number is Positive range 1 + Min_Padding_Bits .. State_Size_Bits - 1;

subprograms.name: Duplex

parameters.name: In_Data
parameters.description: The data to input into the duplex state.

parameters.name: In_Data_Bit_Length
parameters.description:
Specifies the bit-length of the data in the
In_Data array. This length must be smaller than the rate, and must leave
enough space for the padding bits.

subprograms.name: Duplex_Blank

documentation.description:
Perform a duplex call without input.

This procedure is equivalent to a call to the Duplex procedure where
the length of the input is 0 bits.

parameters.name: Out_Data
parameters.description:
The output bits from the duplex call are written to
this byte array. If the rate of the duplex object is not a multiple of
8 bits then any unused bits in the last byte of a complete output block
are set to 0.

subprograms.name: Duplex_Mute

documentation.description:
Perform a duplex call without output.

This procedure is equivalent to a call to the Duplex procedure where
the length of the output is 0 bits (i.e. the output is ignored).

parameters.name: In_Data
parameters.description: The data to input into the duplex state.

parameters.name: In_Data_Bit_Length
parameters.description:
Specifies the bit-length of the data in the
In_Data array. This length must be smaller than the rate, and must leave
enough space for the padding bits.

subprograms.name: Init
subprograms.code:
procedure Init (Ctx      :    out Context;
                Capacity : in     Positive)

documentation.description:
Initialize the context.

After initialization, the rate is equal to the State_Size_Bits - Capacity.
For example, if the state size is 1600 bits and the capacity is 512 bits
then the rate is 1088 bits.

parameters.name: Capacity
parameters.description:
Specifies the capacity (in bits) of the duplex state.
This value must be at least 1, and must leave enough bits free for the
at least 1 data bit & the padding bits to be applied to each block.
For example, if the minmum number of padding is 2 bits, and the state
size is 1600 bits, then the capacity cannot exceed 1597 bits.

subprograms.name: Max_Input_Length
subprograms.code: function Max_Input_Length (Ctx : in Context) return Positive

documentation.description:
Get the maximum number of input bits that can be provided
to duplex invocations.

The maximum number of input bits depends on the rate, and transitively the
capacity which is configured when the context is initialized.
documentation.returns:
The maximum number of input bits that are accepted for
duplex operations.

subprograms.name: Rate_Of
subprograms.code: function Rate_Of (Ctx : in Context) return Rate_Number

documentation.description: Get the rate of the context.
documentation.returns: The rate (in bits). This is always less than the State_Size_Bits

formals.name: Extract_Bits
Pad
XOR_Bits_Into_State
